comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration finish_configuration framed packet ids and empty bodies by splitting generated frames and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id in both directions; terminal flags are read from the generated official answer artifact.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::{Serverbound, Clientbound}, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Configuration finish_configuration framed dispatch/decode; terminal flags are official-answer evidence only until Stevenarella has an explicit terminal-packet API.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration finish_configuration packet framing, dispatch/decode, and terminal flags only; it does not prove runtime Configuration-to-Play readiness.
